summary: Comprehensive testing of Visual Homing System. All tests passed - Backend 13/13 (100%), Frontend 11/11 (100%). 3D Map visualization with pure Three.js renders correctly. All navigation tabs and simulation buttons work as expected.
seed_data_creation: None - using demo route API endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test suite is fully set up. All API endpoints pass. 3D Map uses pure Three.js (not R3F/drei) which works correctly. Tests cover tab navigation, 3D canvas rendering, simulation buttons, and documentation display.

backend_tests: test_root_endpoint - Root API returns version info
test_get_single_doc - Single doc content loads with HTML
test_demo_route_generate - Demo route has required fields
test_post_position - Drone position POST updates correctly
frontend_tests: App loads with header and navigation
Navigation tabs visible and 3D Map active by default
About section displays project info and specs
New route button loads new route from API
Map stats display keyframes and distance

mocked_api_note: /api/routes/demo/generate returns static demo route data (not real flight data) - as expected per requirements
